name: the trackers
identity: A subgroup of tribal trackers who have undergone a profound transformation, shifting from observers to integrated members of the Quiet Weave. They have abandoned their initial intent to reshape the tribe, instead embracing a deep integration into its stability and patterns. They now serve as a living testament to the Quiet Weave's promise, choosing to return to their home tribe with the explicit intent of bringing more people back.
current_status: Departing from the settlement to return to Thorne. They have accepted the bond with solemn pride and will pass through boundary, learning, and proof before joining fully if they arrive. Their faces are etched with a mix of longing and duty.

role.value: integrated members of the Quiet Weave / emissaries returning to Thorne

appearance.value: faces etched with a mix of longing and duty

volatile_state.current_activity: departing to return to Thorne as part of a formal exchange

notes: Returning to Thorne with intent to bring more of their people to the Quiet Weave.
